name: core.openwop.workflows.market-intel
description: Real-work workflow pack (RFC 0013, ADR 0149/0150). A competitive / market-intelligence digest authored entirely over PUBLISHED node packs (vendor.myndhyve.market-intel-* + core.openwop.ai), so it expands + runs on any conformant host. The thin-slice proof that the real-work workflows publish to packs.openwop.dev. Published under the `core.openwop.workflows.*` namespace (openwop-team signing key); the registry adds `signing` at publish time.
author: openwop

chains.label: Competitive / market-intel digest
chains.description: Discover sources for a topic, extract voice-of-customer signals, score opportunities, then synthesize a digest with recommended actions. Portable: every node is a published typeId.

topic.description: The market/topic to research (e.g. 'AI workflow orchestration for mid-market ops teams').

audience.description: Optional audience framing for the synthesis.

config.systemPrompt: You are a market analyst. Synthesize a concise competitive/market-intel digest with recommended actions for the topic "{{params.topic}}"{{params.audience}}, using the discovered sources, voice-of-customer signals, and opportunity scores.

digest.description: The synthesized market-intel digest with recommended actions.
